## Tokenization (implementation requirement)

Avoid scattering hex codes across components.

Preferred (Tailwind): extend theme with:

- `brand.accent = #FC4E1B`
- `brand.bg = #EBF5FF`

Alternative: CSS variables:

- `--brand-accent: #FC4E1B;`
- `--brand-bg: #EBF5FF;`

---
